nasb.text: But as for you, you are to keep My statutes and My judgments and shall not do any of these abominations, neither the native, nor the alien who sojourns among you

esv.text: But you shall keep my statutes and my rules and do none of these abominations, either the native or the stranger who sojourns among you

cnv.text: 所以，你們要謹守我的律例和典章；這一切可憎的事，無論是本地人或是在你們中間寄居的外人，一件都不可作

ccb.text: 你们必须遵守我的律例和典章。不论你们还是寄居在你们中间的外族人，都不可做这些可憎之事。
